titlestmt.titleproper: Finding Aid for Missouri Topographic Maps and Selected Geography Department Map Sheets
titlestmt.author: Draft EAD3 finding aid assembled from previously generated EAD files; review and edit locally as needed.

publicationstmt.publisher: Draft EAD3 finding aid for GitHub Pages and local revision.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: Merged the AMS/USGS Missouri Topographic Maps EAD with the selected-cabinets EAD into a single collection-level finding aid for web catalog deployment.

repository.corpname: University of Missouri, Department of Geography map collection (edit repository name as needed)

did.unittitle: Geography Department Map Collection: Missouri Topographic Maps and Selected Map Sheets
did.unitid: Merged draft finding aid for Cabinet 13D and selected cabinet worksheets
did.physloc: Cabinet 13D and selected cabinet/miscellaneous locations recorded in the processing workbook

archdesc.abstract: Collection-level finding aid bringing together one topographic maps series and four selected worksheet-derived series from the Geography Department map collection.

scopecontent.p: The described materials include AMS and USGS Missouri topographic map sheets at multiple scales, together with selected city maps, land use and zoning maps, transportation and human geography maps, survey maps, tourist and road maps, and miscellaneous sheets drawn from additional cabinets and storage areas.

arrangement.p: Arranged in five top-level series: AMS and USGS Missouri Topographic Maps; Columbia Map Cabinet; MO Human Geography Cabinet; Missouri Cities Cabinet; and Misc. The topographic maps series retains nested subseries by issuing body/series and scale; the other four series list items in workbook order.

processinfo.p: Descriptions are preliminary and were derived from spreadsheet data and earlier generated EAD drafts. Titles, creators, dates, and location information should be reviewed against the physical items before public release.

did.unittitle: AMS and USGS Missouri Topographic Maps

c.abstract: Collection of topographic and related map sheets covering Missouri (with limited adjacent coverage), issued primarily by the United States Geological Survey (USGS) and the U.S. Army Map Service (AMS), including multiple scales and series represented in Cabinet 13D.

scopecontent.p: The maps include USGS and AMS topographic series at multiple scales (e.g., 1:25,000; 1:50,000; 1:100,000; 1:125,000; 1:250,000; and Missouri geological survey series at 1:31,680 and 1:48,000). Titles in the inventory typically include quadrangle/place name, scale series index, and edition/copy notes.

arrangement.p: Arranged in series by issuing body/series and scale (as recorded in the intake inventory), then by map title/edition within each series. Physical storage is in Cabinet 13D, with folders labeled by series.

accessrestrict.p: Open for research use. Some items may be restricted due to fragility or incomplete condition; consult repository staff.

userestrict.p: Copyright status varies. Many sheets are U.S. government works (often in the public domain in the United States), but users are responsible for determining rights and obtaining permissions for publication where applicable.

appraisal.p: 7 sheets are flagged in the intake inventory as incomplete and planned for discarding/deaccessioning. They are listed in the component inventory with status notes.

did.unittitle: USGS 1:125,000-Topographic Maps of the United States/Reconnaissance Maps

scopecontent.p: Series consists of topographic map sheets issued as part of this series. Scale: 1:125,000.
Series consists of topographic map sheets issued as part of this series. Scale: 1:25,000.
